message:
fix(context): add missing sudo flags (-r, -D) to sanitizer

The sudo wrapper handling in sanitize_for_pattern_matching was missing
-r (role) and -D (chdir) flags. This caused commands like:

  sudo -D /tmp git commit -m "Fix rm -rf detection"

to incorrectly identify /tmp as the command instead of git, preventing
proper sanitization of the commit message.

Added -r, -D to SHORT_VALUE_OPTS and --role, --chdir to LONG_VALUE_OPTS.
Also added 3 new tests covering these cases.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
